page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 24 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The CPU configuration includes a 33 MB L3 cache and supports AVX and AVX-512F vector extensions. The instance is equipped with 93.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.88 GB of RAM per core, but does not include local storage.

Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA T4 GPU from the Turing architecture family, featuring 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear performance split. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, placing in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests, with single-threaded gzip compression scoring in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance is average, with multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and Geekbench multi-core scores landing in the middle 50%. Conversely, the GPU-driven LLM inference capabilities are highly efficient, achieving top-tier results in the top 10% for prompt processing and strong results in the top 25% for text generation using both 135M and 7B parameter models.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and the inclusion of an NVIDIA T4 GPU, this instance offers a specialized hardware profile. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that can offload computation to the GPU rather than relying on high single-core CPU performance. The instance is best suited for light to medium deep learning inference, AI model serving, and GPU-accelerated parallel processing tasks, while being less optimal for single-threaded CPU-bound applications or workloads requiring high-speed local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 93.0 GB of RAM and a single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM, while lacking local storage. Network connectivity is rated at an 8 Gbps baseline. Performance benchmarks reveal weak single-core CPU capabilities but average multi-core performance. In contrast, its GPU-driven LLM inference performance is highly competitive, achieving top-tier results in prompt processing and strong results in text generation for 135M and 7B models. This hardware profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for GPU-centric workloads. It is well-suited for machine learning inference, parallel processing, and lightweight AI model serving, though it is less optimal for single-threaded CPU tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 24 Intel Xeon cores, 93 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU, optimized for machine learning inference and parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.6xlarge features 24 Intel Xeon cores, 93 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for accelerated machine learning inference.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance combining dedicated Intel Xeon cores with an NVIDIA T4 GPU for efficient machine learning inference and parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for hardware acceleration
93.0 GB system memory and 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier prompt processing performance for 135M and 7B LLM models
No local storage included, requiring external storage solutions
Best suited for machine learning inference and GPU-accelerated workloads
